title: KWSP/EPF Third Schedule - Rate of Monthly Contributions

categoryA.description: Employees below 60 years old (Malaysian citizens; non-citizen permanent residents; non-citizens who elected to contribute before 1 August 1998) - Part A of Third Schedule

rates.note: Applies for months where wages exceed RM20,000.00. Total contribution (incl. cents) rounded up to next ringgit.

categoryB.description: Malaysian citizen employees aged 60 years and above - Part E of Third Schedule

rates.note: Applies for months where wages exceed RM20,000.00. Total contribution (incl. cents) rounded up to next ringgit.
